name: demo-ipxe-os
ipxeScript:
#!ipxe
kernel https://github.com/netbootxyz/ubuntu-squash/releases/download/20.04.6-a1b16d57/vmlinuz ip=dhcp fb=false interface=ens5f0 url=https://releases.ubuntu.com/20.04.6/ubuntu-20.04.6-live-server-amd64.iso autoinstall ds=nocloud-net;s=${cloudinit-url} initrd=initrd.magic
initrd https://github.com/netbootxyz/ubuntu-squash/releases/download/20.04.6-a1b16d57/initrd
boot
userData:
#cloud-config
users:
  - default
  - name: demo-user
    gecos: Demo User
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    groups: root
    lock_passwd: true
    ssh_authorized_keys:
      - ssh-ed25519 ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIAcV/3oxRllEji0wl9F6icRk+Kme0H2MMAPFizKB5yv8 demo@example.com

autoinstall:
  version: 1

  identity:
    hostname: demo-host
    password: $6$jCfWFbdxh1lK09sY$pxFnrW/yXewYFmgoaywu3WKhdPQg0e8DR8jvedAV.udXM0.i5M6wr4Up2S7ZCN9kNDmg.s7fmrOaXE6nEyzPb/ # Welcome123
    username: ubuntu

  ntp:
    enabled: true
    ntp_client: chrony
    servers:
      - 129.6.15.32

  keyboard:
    layout: us
    toggle: null
    variant: ""
  locale: en_US
  ssh:
    allow-pw: true
    authorized-keys: []
    install-server: true

statusHistory.message: Operating System is ready for use
